name: icegres-js-bench
description: Frontend data-path probes and benchmark for icegres: browser dashboards over Flight SQL (Arrow) vs pgwire (JSON), through a proxy or gRPC-web direct.
comment:optionalDependencies: @lakehouse-rs/flight-sql-client is a native (napi) binary used only by node-bench.mjs's opt-in BENCH_NATIVE lane; kept optional so its platform-specific install cannot fail the whole install (and the browser gate) on an unsupported platform.
